_patch_meta.description: Assign the two remaining P-status verses in M05-BOUNDARY to G-status with group assignments. Amo 5:21 (H6116 a.tsa.rah, vr=192566) assigned to Group 2148 (solemn assembly group). 2Pe 1:3 (G1433 dōreō, vr=215044) assigned to Group 2597 (God's granting group). Both held as G-status in BOUNDARY to enable later analysis. Researcher decision confirmed 20260507: assign as G-status rather than set-aside, per BOUNDARY structural characterisation (WA-M05-BOUNDARY-findings-v1-20260507).

values.notes: Amo 5:21 — divine rejection of solemn assembly lacking inner characteristics (love, justice). Assigned G-status to Group 2148 (solemn assembly group) in BOUNDARY for later analysis. Inner characteristic content (love, goodness) belongs to M05-A and M05-D; assembly occasion is the BOUNDARY term. Researcher decision 20260507.

2Pe 1:3 — divine granting of all things for life and godliness. Assigned G-status to Group 2597 (God's granting group) in BOUNDARY. The granting act enables koinōnos participation in divine nature (M05-G Group 1057, 2Pe 1:4); dōreō names the enabling giving-act, not the participation characteristic itself. Researcher decision 20260507.
